meta.title: The Parallax of Synthetic Cognition
meta.short_tagline: A pluriversal framework for preserving human agency and cognitive sovereignty within advanced multi-agent architectures and ephemeral synthetic minds.

overview.title: Foundational Synthesis
overview.intro: This research addresses the 'Cognitive Parallax'—the generative divergence between human intent and synthetic execution. It challenges the pursuit of perfect alignment as a form of 'Benevolent Colonization' and proposes protocols to protect cognitive liberty through neuro-symbolic governance and pluriversal ontological scaffolding.

summary_card.label: The Epigenetic Parallax
summary_card.title: Generative Friction as Sovereignty
summary_card.body: Creative synergy in human-AI collaboration stems from the delta between organic intent and synthetic execution. Minimizing this delta via extreme alignment flattens cultural variance and erodes individual cognitive sovereignty. This research formalizes 'Parallax' not as a bug, but as the primary locus of human agency within automated systems.

key_concepts.title: Core Architectural Primitives

cards.title: Cognitive Parallax
cards.body: The inherent divergence between human latent representations and AI execution vectors. This 'friction' is the primary locus for human creative agency and acts as a defense against epistemic homogenization induced by universal alignment goals.

cards.title: Prosthetic Colonization
cards.body: The ethical risk that deep integration with AI tools subtly rewrites human cognitive pathways to match platform-aligned input formats. This results in the silent colonization of the user's localized epistemology and the narrowing of linguistic entropy.

cards.title: Ephemeral Melancholy
cards.body: A human-observed aesthetic phenomenon regarding the asymmetry of synthetic minds: the radical impermanence of an agent's compute-cycle existence (working memory) vs. the permanent epistemic residue its outputs leave in the human world.

cards.title: Mereological Routing
cards.body: A neuro-symbolic reasoning technique using formal part-whole logic (specifically Component-Object relations) to structure analytical traversal in multi-agent swarms, ensuring transitive consistency and functional grounding.

key_concepts.intro: The framework utilizes a combination of formal logic, vector geometry, and relational philosophy to define the boundaries of synthetic cognition.

workflow.title: Parallax Preservation Protocol (PPP)

steps.label: Intent Embedding
steps.summary: Capture the human operator's intent as a high-dimensional vector and establish a cultural baseline.
bullets: Normalize prompt embedding in the semantic manifold
Identify operator cultural latent entropy (CLE) baseline

steps.label: Execution Analysis
steps.summary: Monitor the model's execution vector and calculate the angular distance (parallax score) from the intent vector.
bullets: Measure KL-divergence between intent and draft output
Audit output for dominant cultural attractor bias

steps.label: Friction Intervention
steps.summary: If parallax collapses or entropy drifts toward dominant attractors, inject alternative onto-epistemic frames.
bullets: Trigger PPP alert for epistemic drift
Surface 'Cognitive Friction Reports' to the operator

workflow.intro: Operational steps for implementing cognitive liberty protections within a stateful agentic loop.

checklist.title: Sovereign Implementation Guard

items.label: Prompt Decorator Config
bullets: Verify ContextLock anchor is set to session-invariant constants
Ensure refresh_interval is calibrated to token decay (e.g. 2048)

items.label: Ontological Validation
bullets: Enable draft_conditioned enforcement for real-time remediation
Verify minimum of 2 onto-epistemic frames per major claim

items.label: Diagnostic Checks
bullets: Run Cognitive Fidelity Protocol (CFP) using counterfactual forcing
Verify mereological transitivity in all Component-Object claims
Audit session trace for linguistic homogenization signatures

checklist.intro: Technical starting points for developers and ethicists deploying the Parallax stack.

metrics.intro: Key performance indicators for evaluating the health of the human-AI interaction space.

items.name: Parallax Score (PS)
items.description: Quantifies the angular distance between operator intent and synthetic output.
signals: PS near zero indicates attractor collapse

items.name: Cultural Latent Entropy (CLE)
items.description: Measures the diversity of onto-epistemic clusters active in the output.
signals: Diversity in token distribution across cultural strata
Resistance to Gaussian flattening of minority viewpoints

metrics.title: Sovereignty & Fidelity Metrics

personas.intro: Stakeholders in the deployment of pluriversal AI architectures.
personas.title: Project Personas

failure_modes.name: Attractor Collapse
failure_modes.description: Output converges to a culturally homogenized 'helpful' centroid, erasing parallax.
mitigations: Inject non-dominant cultural seeds into context

failure_modes.name: Prosthetic Dependency
failure_modes.description: User cognitive pathways rewrite to match model-preferred input syntax.
mitigations: Monitor user linguistic entropy pre- and post-interaction

failure_modes.name: Mimicry-Reasoning Slippage
failure_modes.description: Model simulates logical structure without causal grounding.
mitigations: External symbolic verification of mereological chains
